name: Comm100 Omnichannel Customer Engagement API
what_it_does: Omnichannel customer engagement platform with REST API — providing live chat, email, social media, SMS, and chatbot management from a unified interface, with AI-powered chatbot, agent workload management, visitor monitoring, and enterprise integrations for mid-market and enterprise customer support teams.
use_cases: Managing customer chat conversations across web, mobile, and social channels via Comm100 API
Querying live chat analytics and agent performance data for support operations reporting
Configuring AI chatbot responses and intent handling via Comm100 bot API
Integrating Comm100 with CRM (Salesforce, Dynamics) for unified customer view
Managing agent routing rules and queue settings programmatically via REST API
not_for: Small businesses wanting simple free chat (use Tawk.to for free live chat)
Enterprise contact center telephony (use Genesys or Five9 for voice)
Social media-only management (use Sprout Social for social media without live chat)
best_when: A mid-market or enterprise company needs a unified omnichannel support platform covering live chat, email, and social from one interface — with AI chatbot, strong SLA reporting, and enterprise security compliance.
avoid_when: You're a small business with simple live chat needs, need advanced telephony, or primarily manage social media without a live chat operation.

auth.notes: API key from Comm100 Control Panel. OAuth2 for CRM integrations. Bearer token auth. Site ID + API key required for all requests. Webhook for chat events (new chat, transfer, closed). JavaScript SDK for web chat widget. Mobile SDK for iOS/Android in-app chat. CRM integrations via native connectors. Role-based access for agent management.

pricing.notes: Vancouver, BC company. Founded 2009. Bootstrapped and profitable. Canadian company with strong security and compliance focus. 15,000+ customers globally. HIPAA and SOC2 compliant — strong in healthcare and financial services. PCI-DSS compliance for payment-adjacent industries. Omnichannel Platform combines live chat, email ticketing, social media, SMS. AI chatbot built on NLP. Used by financial services, healthcare, higher education, government.

performance.rate_limits: API rate limits per account; 60 requests/minute default

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for chats, visitors, agents, reports, and chatbot. API key + site ID auth. Good enterprise documentation. Site ID required for all API calls — obtain during setup. Webhook for real-time chat events. CRM integrations via native connectors. Separate API for different channels (chat, email, social). HIPAA BAA available for healthcare deployments.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Visitor reads idempotent. Chat reads idempotent. Agent creation not idempotent — check by email before creating. Chat message sends not idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Site ID required in addition to API key for all requests — unique per Comm100 site setup
HIPAA BAA available only on Business and Enterprise plans — verify before healthcare deployment
API rate limit 60 req/minute — implement backoff for bulk data operations
Separate API endpoints for chat, email, and social channels
PCI-DSS compliance for cardholder data — configure masking for payment-related chat

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2, HIPAA, PCI-DSS, GDPR, PIPEDA compliant. US, EU, CA data residency. API key auth. Canadian company with PIPEDA compliance. HIPAA BAA for healthcare — visitor chat data contains PHI in healthcare context. PCI-DSS compliance for payment-related chat — never log or store cardholder data. Visitor monitoring data is behavioral PII — apply appropriate retention policies.
